items.title: Opening statements to start in the trial of a Georgia high school shooting suspect's father
items.description: The trial of a man whose teenage son is accused of killing two students and two teachers at a Georgia high school in 2024 is set to get underway

items.title: Searchers find wreck of luxury steamer lost in Lake Michigan more than 150 years ago
items.description: A search team has discovered the wreck of a luxury steamer that sank in a Lake Michigan gale more than 150 years ago

items.title: Presidents Day 2026: Here's what's open and closed on the holiday
items.description: Government offices, the stock market and schools are closed Monday in observance of Presidents Day, but most big retailers are open

items.title: Ash Wednesday marks the start of Lent, a period of fasting, reflection — and fish fries
items.description: For many Christians, this week brings Ash Wednesday, a solemn day of fasting and reflection

items.title: Obama shuts down alien buzz and says there's no evidence they've made contact
items.description: Former U.S. President Barack Obama has clarified comments he made about alien life on a podcast over the weekend
